name: Mrs. Field's Black and Whites
recipeIngredient: 5 1/4 ounces Semisweet chocolate bar; coarsely chopped
5 1/4 ounces White chocolate bar; coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 300 degrees (yes, it says 300). In a medium bowl, combine flour, cocoa, baking soda and salt. Mix well with a wire whisk. Set aside. Blend sugars in a large bowl using an electric mixer set at medium speed. Add butter and mix to form a grainy paste, scraping down the sides of the bowl. Add eggs and vanilla extract, and beat at medium speed until smooth. Gradually add the flour mixture and chopped chocolates, blending at low speed until just combined. Do not overmix. Drop rounded tablespoons onto ungreased cookie sheets, 2 inches apart. Bake for 23-25 minutes. Transfer cookies immediately to a cool flat surface. Yield: 3 dozen.
Note: I also made her oatmeal cookies at 300 degrees for 23-25 minutes and found that they needed to be left in the oven a little longer.
